ItacPersonItem.Notes: A member of the Infuriati Academy in Naples (not mentioned by Maylender). For Cusano`s affiliation to the Infuriati Academy see Gio. Battista Bergazzano, Le Varie Fortune, Naples, 1637. Dedicatory verses to Cusano in Baldassarre Pisani, Poesie Liriche, Venice, 1676, p. 82 (BL Shelfmark: 11429.df.1.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
